info.title: Agility CMS REST API
info.description: Agility CMS REST API for retrieving content from the Agility CMS.  The API Types are fetch (for published content) and preview (for latest, or staging content).

get.summary: Returns content models for the Agility instance.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

schema.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

parameters.name: apitype
parameters.description: The API type (preview, fetch).

parameters.name: lastModifiedDate
parameters.description: The last modified date/time that the Models list was updated, eg: 2020-09-24T10:00:00.00-04:00.

schema.description: The last modified date/time that the Models list was updated, eg: 2020-09-24T10:00:00.00-04:00.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

schema.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

parameters.name: apitype
parameters.description: The Type of API - fetch or preview.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The galleryID of the requested gallery.

schema.description: The galleryID of the requested gallery.

401.description: The request could not be authorized. Invalid or missing apiKey.

get.summary: Gets the details of a content item by ther Content ID.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

schema.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

parameters.name: apitype
parameters.description: The API type (preview, fetch).

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale code you want to retrieve content for.

schema.description: The locale code you want to retrieve content for.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The contentID of the requested item in this locale.

schema.description: The contentID of the requested item in this locale.

parameters.name: contentLinkDepth
parameters.description: The maximum level to expand linked content from this item

schema.description: The maximum level to expand linked content from this item

parameters.name: expandAllContentLinks
parameters.description: Whether or not to expand entire linked content references, includings lists and items that are rendered in the CMS as Grid or Link.

schema.description: Whether or not to expand entire linked content references, includings lists and items that are rendered in the CMS as Grid or Link.

404.description: The content item is not found. If quering production, ensure the item has been published.

401.description: The request could not be authorized. Invalid or missing apiKey.

parameters.name: locale

parameters.name: contentLinkDepth

parameters.name: expandAllContentLinks
parameters.description: Whether or not to expand entire linked content references, includings lists and items that are rendered in the CMS as Grid or Link.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of content items by reference name.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

schema.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

parameters.name: apitype
parameters.description: The API type (preview, fetch).

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale code you want to retrieve content for.

schema.description: The locale code you want to retrieve content for.

parameters.name: referenceName
parameters.description: The unique reference name of the content list you wish to retrieve in the current locale. Reference names must be ALL lowercase.

schema.description: The unique reference name of the content list you wish to retrieve in the current locale. Reference names must be ALL lowercase.

parameters.name: ContentLinkDepth
parameters.description: [Optional] The depth of list items. Maximum allowed is 5.

schema.description: [Optional] The depth of list items. Maximum allowed is 5.

parameters.name: ExpandAllContentLinks
parameters.description: [Optional] Whether or not to expand entire linked content references, includings lists and items that are rendered in the CMS as Grid or Link.

schema.description: [Optional] Whether or not to expand entire linked content references, includings lists and items that are rendered in the CMS as Grid or Link.

parameters.name: Fields
parameters.description: [Optional] A comma separated list of the fields to return.

schema.description: [Optional] A comma separated list of the fields to return.

parameters.name: Take
parameters.description: [Optional] The maximum number of items to retrieve in this request. Default is 10. Maximum allowed is 250.

schema.description: [Optional] The maximum number of items to retrieve in this request. Default is 10. Maximum allowed is 250.

parameters.name: Skip
parameters.description: [Optional] The number of items to skip from the list. Default is 0. Used for implementing pagination.

schema.description: [Optional] The number of items to skip from the list. Default is 0. Used for implementing pagination.

parameters.name: Filter
parameters.description: [Optional] The filter you wish to apply to the list query. Supports [eq (Equal To), ne (Not Equal), lt (Less Than), lte (Less Than or Equal), gt (Greater Than), gte (Greater Than or Equal), contains (given that the field value is a csv string) and in (given that the filter value is a csv string)]. Example value: `fields.title[eq]"some title" or fields.details[like]"some text" and fields.linkedfield_ValueField[contains]"1"`

schema.description: [Optional] The filter you wish to apply to the list query. Supports [eq (Equal To), ne (Not Equal), lt (Less Than), lte (Less Than or Equal), gt (Greater Than), gte (Greater Than or Equal), contains (given that the field value is a csv string) and in (given that the filter value is a csv string)]. Example value: `fields.title[eq]"some title" or fields.details[like]"some text" and fields.linkedfield_ValueField[contains]"1"`

parameters.name: Sort
parameters.description: [Optional] The field to sort the results by. Example fields.title or properties.created, seo.metaDescription

schema.description: [Optional] The field to sort the results by. Example fields.title or properties.created, seo.metaDescription

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: [Optional] The direction to sort the results by. Default is asc. Valid values are asc, desc.

schema.description: [Optional] The direction to sort the results by. Default is asc. Valid values are asc, desc.

401.description: The request could not be authorized. Invalid or missing apiKey.

404.description: The content list is not found. If quering production, ensure at least one item in the list has been published.

get.summary: Gets the details of a page by its Page ID.

parameters.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

schema.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

parameters.name: apitype
parameters.description: The API type (preview, fetch).

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale code you want to retrieve content for.

schema.description: The locale code you want to retrieve content for.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique page ID of the page you wish to retrieve in the current locale.

schema.description: The unique page ID of the page you wish to retrieve in the current locale.

parameters.name: contentLinkDepth
parameters.description: The maximum level to expand linked content from this item

schema.description: The maximum level to expand linked content from this item

parameters.name: expandAllContentLinks
parameters.description: Whether or not to expand entire linked content references, includings lists and items that are rendered in the CMS as Grid or Link and linked to modules or linked items on this page.

schema.description: Whether or not to expand entire linked content references, includings lists and items that are rendered in the CMS as Grid or Link and linked to modules or linked items on this page.

404.description: The page item is not found. If quering production, ensure the page has been published.

schema.description: The path of the page

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The reference name of the digital channel of the sitemap to return. If you only have one channel, your channel reference name is likely 'website'.

get.summary: Gets the sitemap, returned in a flat list, where the dictionary key is the page path. This method is ideal for page routing.

parameters.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

schema.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

parameters.name: apitype
parameters.description: The Type of API - fetch or preview.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale code you want to retreive content for

schema.description: The locale code you want to retreive content for

parameters.name: channelName
parameters.description: The reference name of the digital channel of the sitemap to return. If you only have one channel, your channel reference name is likely 'website'.

schema.description: The reference name of the digital channel of the sitemap to return. If you only have one channel, your channel reference name is likely 'website'.

404.description: The page item is not found. If quering production, ensure the page has been published.

get.summary:
Retrieves all content items in a paged format.
Each call returns a sync token that should be persisted and passed into subsequent requests to maintain sync state.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

schema.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

parameters.name: apitype
parameters.description: The Type of API - fetch or preview.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale code you want to sync content items for.

schema.description: The locale code you want to sync content items for.

parameters.name: syncToken
parameters.description: The token from the most recently synced value.

schema.description: The token from the most recently synced value.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of items to return per set.

schema.description: The number of items to return per set.

401.description: The request could not be authorized. Invalid or missing apiKey.

get.summary:
Retrieves all pages items in a paged format.
Each call returns a sync token that should be persisted and passed into subsequent requests to maintain sync state.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

schema.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

parameters.name: apitype

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale code you want to sync pages for.

schema.description: The locale code you want to sync pages for.

parameters.name: syncToken
parameters.description: The token from the most recently synced value.

schema.description: The token from the most recently synced value.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of items to return per set.

schema.description: The number of items to return per set.

401.description: The request could not be authorized. Invalid or missing apiKey.

get.summary: Gets the list of all URL Redirections since a particular date/time. Persist the lastAccessDate that is returned and use that value to maintain state on subsequent requests.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

schema.description: The instance GUID, available from the API Keys section.

parameters.name: apitype
parameters.description: The Type of API - fetch or preview.

parameters.name: lastAccessDate
parameters.description: The last access date/time that the URL Redirections list was previously accessed, eg: 2020-09-24T10:00:00.00-04:00.

schema.description: The last access date/time that the URL Redirections list was previously accessed, eg: 2020-09-24T10:00:00.00-04:00.

401.description: The request could not be authorized. Invalid or missing apiKey.

url.description: Url that media item can be accessed at.

size.description: Size of media item in bytes.

metaData.description: List of meta data related to media item in key value format.

media.description: List of Media items in gallery.

contentID.description: The unique ID of the content item in this locale.

properties.description: The system properties of the content item.

fields.description: A dictionary of the fields and the values of the content item.

seo.description: SEO related fields for the content item. This is only returned for Dynamic Page Items.

items.description: The paginated items returned from the query.

totalCount.description: The total number of items in the list (excluding any pagination).

menu.description: Indicates if page is visible in the menu.

sitemap.description: Indicates if the page is visible in the sitemap.

metaDescription.description: The meta description for this static/dynamic page.
metaDescription.example: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consetetur sadipscing elitr, sed diam nonumy eirmod tempor invidunt ut labore et dolore magna aliquyam erat, sed diam voluptua.

metaKeywords.description: The meta keywords for this static/dynamic page.

metaHTML.description: Additional markup to be included in the *head* element of the page.

excludedFromGlobal.description: Indicates if scripts are excluded from global.

top.description: Scripts to include on top of the page.

bottom.description: Scripts to include on the bottom of the page.

state.description: The state of this content item. 1 = Staging, 2 = Published, 3 = Deleted, 4 = Approved, 5 = AwaitingApproval, 6 = Declined, 7 = Unpublished

modified.description: The date/time the item was last modified

created.description: The date/time this item was last modified.

versionID.description: The unique versionID of this content item.

referenceName.description: The reference name of this item is part of. This may be the reference name of a content list, item, or module.

definitionName.description: The reference name of the content/module definition this item is based on.

templateName.description: Name of the template used to create the page.

securePage.description: Indicates if the page is secure.

excludeFromOutputCache.description: Indicates if the page is excluded from cache.

zones.description: Zones on the page defined by the template

target.description: Target to open the Url in.

isFolder.description: Indicates if the item is a folder.
Indicates if the item is a folder.

APIKeyAuthorization.description: Please enter your API Key for the API Type that you are accessing (fetch, preview)
APIKeyAuthorization.name: APIKey
